common_symptoms: persistent height calibration warning after component replacement
physical_solution: With vehicle on level surface, fuel full, no cargo/passengers, tire pressures correct and ignition ON engine OFF: clear learned height offsets via UDS Routine 0x0501, then initiate height reference learning via Routine 0x0502. ECU samples all 4 corner height sensors and stores new reference values. Cycle ignition and verify warning light clears.

procedure_steps.description: Read current ride heights via DID F301-F304 (FL/FR/RL/RR) — establish baseline
Enter extended diagnostic session on Height Control ECU (0x7A0): UDS 10 03
Initiate height reference learning: UDS 31 01 05 02 (Routine 0x0502) — wait 3s, do not move vehicle
Re-read all 4 corner heights — verify all within +/-8 mm of target
Send TesterPresent keep-alive (3E 00), exit session — cycle ignition OFF/ON

prerequisites: Fuel tank full or at consistent level
Front and rear height sensors connected

outcomes.notes: Post height sensor replacement — calibration cleared warning light immediately
Unevenness 14mm side-to-side resolved after learning routine
